text:
Shield of Faith (信念の楯, Shinnen no Tate) is a card found in the Greed Island game. It is one of the game's 100 designated slot cards and is required for a player to complete the game.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This card allows the caster to summon forth a Shield of Faith. When in use by a player, it renders most-any cards that allow another player to escape ineffective, providing they be within a radius of 20 Meters. Any player trying to use "Relegate", "Return", "Drift", and "Collision" will be surprised to find it fail, and the card be destroyed. This card is useful for players who wish to prevent others from escaping.

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.087 :: 信念の楯 
これを装備したプレイヤーの半径２０ｍは「左遷」「初心」「漂流」「衝突」のスペルが無効になる。
|-
![Eng]
|No.087 :: Shield of Faith 
The Spells "Relegate", "Return", "Drift", and "Collision" are in-affective within a 20m radius of a player equipped with this card.
|}
